subject: Automatic collecting of maven artifacts
commit_message:
Automatic collecting of maven artifacts

collect mvn artefacts to run offline installation

Change-Id: I85fe794437fbe7783418cf1d051c752825e2be8c
Issue-ID: OOM-1799
Signed-off-by: Mateusz Pilat <m.pilat@partner.samsung.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/offline-installer-master-review/81/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/offline-installer-master-review/81

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

the important part is missing (or in part of another commit?) i.e. 
script for cloning needed onap repos and script for collecting correct pom.xml files from those repos. And to integrate building scripts to call all of these.

Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

It is not clear yet. We do not have the list of projects we should obtain dependencies from. Also form of the input is still not clear.

Patch Set 1:

this is more like helping script, I am wondering if it's good to have it in this place because this looks not to be part of our build procedure followed in upstream. As of now "helping scripts" are stored in root folder

Patch Set 1:

I would categorize it as "data generation" script, like the docker-images-collector.sh Its outcome will be a list that will serve as input for downloading. What is missing is to know what pom.xml we need (as far as I know we do not have automated way to identify them).

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

negative comment is about functionality which we need to add in additional step and it will require some further research, I think we should merge this script and during vFWCL (OOM-1900) let's observe missing parts.

Patch Set 1:

what you get by merging this? 
And we really should get rid of those internet dependencies. Please let's concentrate to fix those. Let's not anymore implement anything related collection of maven artifacts when fix should be made to onap component itself. 
Big part has been already fixed in Policy, there's not much left.

and BTW and review, especially -1/-2 are positive thing not negative:)

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> what you get by merging this? 
> And we really should get rid of those internet dependencies. Please let's concentrate to fix those. Let's not anymore implement anything related collection of maven artifacts when fix should be made to onap component itself. 
> Big part has been already fixed in Policy, there's not much left.
> 
> and BTW and review, especially -1/-2 are positive thing not negative:)

I agree with Samuli. There is no way of automatizing it in reasonable way, I will abandon and if we do not fix it by getting rid of it we can comeback to looking for alternatives.
